parsed.production_notes: Natural lighting, realistic skin textures, fluid human movements, and natural hair physics indicate live-action recording. No AI artifacts are present.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s, slim build, fair complexion. Long dark hair tied in a high ponytail.
Mid-20s, muscular build, fair complexion. Short dark hair.

panels.panel_visual_description: Close-up of a person's hands holding a smartphone. The thumbs are positioned over the lower half of the screen as if typing. The background is dark and out of focus.

scenes.setting: Gym, daytime, blurred equipment in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands in a gym, holding a smartphone horizontally in front of her mouth. She is looking down at the phone screen. The background shows blurred gym equipment and a window with daylight.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is recording a voice message on her phone in a gym. A white text box overlay shows her transcribed speech in real-time.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Remember, हमारी बात हुई थी last week regarding the collab? I think this is the right time, so let's meet on Tuesday 2pm [Remember, we had a talk last week regarding the collab? I think this is the right time, so let's meet on Tuesday 2pm]
scenes.on_screen_text: Remember, humari baat hui thi last week regarding the collab? I think this is the right time, so let's meet on Tuesday 2pm

panels.panel_visual_description: Low-angle close-up of Character B's face. He has his eyes squeezed shut and mouth open in a grimace, appearing to exert intense physical effort. A blurred metal barbell is visible in the immediate foreground.

scenes.visual_description: Quick cut to Character B straining to lift a barbell, making a loud noise.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is holding her smartphone horizontally. She briefly looks up with a slightly distracted or annoyed expression, then looks back down at her phone and continues speaking into it.

scenes.visual_description: Character A reacts to the loud noise, then corrects the meeting time she just dictated. The text overlay updates with her correction.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: err sorry, Wednesday 3 pm. [err sorry, Wednesday 3 pm.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up view of a dark-themed smartphone screen.

scenes.visual_description: Screencast of a chat application. The dictated text is shown with a strikethrough on the incorrect time, which is then automatically replaced by the corrected time. A 'Real Time Auto Correction' graphic is overlaid.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Real Time Auto Correction
Processing
Tuesday 2pm err sorry
Wednesday at 3 pm.
